rationale: Educ. Code §37.2121 governs school safety memoranda of understanding and mutual aid agreements. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The center shall identify and inform school districts of the types of entities, including local and regional authorities, other school districts, and emergency first responders, with whom school districts should customarily make efforts to enter into memoranda of understanding or mutual aid agreements addressing issues that affect school safety and security.
_note: No conflict. Rule concerns school safety MOUs; proposed change concerns homestead exemption amount. No overlap.
